case_title: ANNAHITA POURMAND VS. URBAN ALLURE, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT URBAN ALLURE, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,999.00 FILED BY POURMAND, ANNAHITA AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN ALLURE, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LORAINE FRANKS--M.D. OWNER, MEDICAL DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED SEP-08-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN ALLURE, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION
